message: Frontend research complete. found bug in work-history.ts line 369. timeline component requires custom implementation.

research.timeline_recommendation: Custom implementation using shadcn Card and Separator primitives
key_findings: Critical bug: line 368 uses v.task_id instead of v.case_id
Timeline component: must be custom-built (shadcn has no native timeline)
React Query v5: refetchInterval receives only query parameter; use query.state.data
shadcn dropdown-menu, sheet, alert-dialog all available
